blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.
Friday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 7" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.8" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
